articles.title: Sumiko at 62: 4 simple exercises from a physiotherapist to ease shoulder pain
articles.content: In late 2023, I felt an unexpected twitch in my right shoulder while exercising. I later developed neck pain on my right side, adding to my frustration. She referred me to a physiotherapist at Singapore General Hospital (SGH). I began therapy in September 2024, not realising how long recovery would take.
